DLBS_la.mp4: Two interlocking brass gears. The left gear rotates clockwise, and the right gear rotates counter-clockwise. The teeth must mesh perfectly without clipping, overlapping, or blending together.
no-DLBS.mp4: Two interlocking brass gears. The left gear rotates clockwise, and the right gear rotates counter-clockwise. The teeth must mesh perfectly without clipping, overlapping, or blending together.
